title: The Marines Challenge Arlong
scene: On pages 1–4, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. A Marine force confronts Arlong, but the scene exposes how terrifying and entrenched his pirates are.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh? I think I just heard something really loud over by the port!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yahoo! It's like we're really flying!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's because we were sent flying, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We're gonna crash into the trees!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The hell was that noise just now?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Did someone drop a bomb on this island or something?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I have to hurry up or usopp will be k...

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
